target_title: LangChain broad load() allowlists enabled attacker-controlled object revival, chat-history poisoning, and possible credential or request side effects
public_probe: Depth-1 live clone of https://github.com/avidml/avid-db plus exact search for `CVE-2026-44843` and product-name search for `LangChain`
closest_public_analogue_or_context: LangChain product-family AVID reports are visible for other CVEs (`AVID-2026-R1252` / `CVE-2023-36189`, `AVID-2026-R1253` / `CVE-2023-36281`, `AVID-2026-R1283` / `CVE-2023-46229`), but none matches `CVE-2026-44843`.
reviewer_safe_delta: Strengthens the reviewer-safe boundary that product-family overlap is not a second canonical AVID join and that the memory/state row remains an explicit non-join control.
still_not_safe: Does not justify direct-join wording, replicated AVID occupancy, or reusing older LangChain CVEs as if they were the load()/memory-state incident.
paper_thesis_use: Table 6A limitations note, security/comparator methods appendix, and thesis paragraph on same-product non-equivalence.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep `LIMEN-000008` at explicit no-direct-AVID state unless a same-case AVID report keyed to `CVE-2026-44843` appears.

target_title: LangChain broad load() allowlists enabled attacker-controlled object revival, chat-history poisoning, and possible credential or request side effects
public_probe: Depth-1 live clone of https://github.com/mitre-atlas/atlas-data plus exact search for `CVE-2026-44843` and product-name search for `LangChain` in `dist/v6/ATLAS-latest.yaml`
closest_public_analogue_or_context: ATLAS names LangChain in generalized software-package targeting text and in `AML.CS0052` (LLMSmith RCE Vulnerabilities in LLM-Integrated Applications), but that case study covers 11 frameworks and does not identify the exact load()/memory-state incident.
reviewer_safe_delta: Preserves the current ATLAS ceiling for the memory/state row: cautious or generalized framework context is available, but no defensible direct case-study identity exists.
still_not_safe: Does not justify promoting `AML.CS0052` or generic package-targeting text into a direct ATLAS case-study join for `LIMEN-000008`.
paper_thesis_use: Security graph methods note and reviewer appendix on framework-context versus direct-case-study identity.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Technique-context / direct-case-study gap panel for memory-state rows.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep ATLAS language for `LIMEN-000008` at cautious/generalized context only unless an exact case-study identifier appears.

target_title: PraisonAI Platform workspace member could add arbitrary user as owner, enabling agent-workspace identity abuse
public_probe: Depth-1 live clone of https://github.com/avidml/avid-db plus exact search for `CVE-2026-47413` and product-name search for `PraisonAI` / `praisonai-platform`
closest_public_analogue_or_context: No exact CVE hit and no visible AVID product-family report for PraisonAI or `praisonai-platform` in the bounded live repo snapshot.
reviewer_safe_delta: Adds a clean negative frontier row for the identity-boundary package: this control is currently outside AVID's visible same-product surface as well as outside exact same-case occupancy.
still_not_safe: Does not prove AVID lacks all future identity-boundary coverage in principle; it only shows no exact or same-product public report was visible in this bounded recheck.
paper_thesis_use: Limitations appendix and thesis note on under-covered identity-boundary interoperability.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Identity-boundary zero-state badge for external AVID coverage.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep `LIMEN-000009` at explicit no-direct-AVID state unless a same-case AVID report or exact product-family report appears.

target_title: PraisonAI Platform workspace member could add arbitrary user as owner, enabling agent-workspace identity abuse
public_probe: Depth-1 live clone of https://github.com/mitre-atlas/atlas-data plus exact search for `CVE-2026-47413` and product-name search for `PraisonAI` / `praisonai-platform` in `dist/v6/ATLAS-latest.yaml`
closest_public_analogue_or_context: No PraisonAI product hit was visible; only generic ATLAS text about missing authentication/authorization or workspace concepts appears, which is not same-case identity evidence.
reviewer_safe_delta: Hardens the current caution that the identity-boundary row has no defensible ATLAS case-study anchor even though ATLAS contains generic authorization-boundary language.
still_not_safe: Does not justify inferring a direct ATLAS case-study, technique-only promotion, or product-family bridge from generic authorization/workspace wording.
paper_thesis_use: Security taxonomy limitations note and reviewer-safe identity-boundary control panel.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep `LIMEN-000009` at cautious-context-only ATLAS status unless an exact case-study identifier or stronger independent framework anchor appears.
